name: Карта Таро с барочным золотом — Годжо Сатору
moment: Satoru Gojo stands full figure, SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal view only (no second view, no model-sheet, no alternate angle anywhere on the print), the figure occupying 76% of frame height, centered and upright in a still, composed stance with an air of effortless supreme confidence, his short tousled white hair rendered in flat luminous ivory-white layers with soft grey shading lines, a plain dark cloth blindfold tied across his eyes (calm unreadable expression, faint knowing smile), wearing his canon dark high-collar uniform jacket with a tall stiff collar, one hand raised beside his temple in a light casual two-finger gesture, the other arm relaxed at his side. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two legs, correct human anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure or floating alternate pose anywhere in the composition. The entire scene sits inside a tall rectangular tarot-arcana card frame filling the canvas: a thick ornate engraved border fusing tarot filigree with baroque acanthus-scroll gold moulding runs continuously around all four edges, small infinity-loop glyphs (referencing his Six Eyes / Limitless technique in an abstract ornamental way, no literal eye imagery) sit one in each of the four corners outside his silhouette, a deep midnight-blue star-dusted sky fills the background behind him with faint constellation lines connecting scattered pale dots, a single radiant halo of soft white light glows directly behind his head without overlapping his blindfold.
art_style: МИКС: карта Таро большого аркана в духе классических оккультных колод конца XIX века (плоские насыщенные заливки, тонкая гравюрная штриховка) обрамлена барочной золотой лепниной — витые акантовые завитки и рельефные рамки заменяют простую тарологическую кайму, добавляя пышность и вес; спокойная светлая мистика без готики
typography: Main phrase 'THE HONORED ONE' is set inside a narrow horizontal engraved title plaque spanning the width of the card directly below the frame's top border ornament (the traditional arcana-name plaque position, fused with a baroque cartouche shape with small scroll flourishes at both ends), plaque fill flat aged parchment-cream with a thin double-rule engraved border (outer rule 0.03x cap-height, inner rule 0.015x cap-height, gap 0.02x cap-height), the phrase set in an elegant engraved serif display face with small decorative flourishes on the terminals, fill solid deep indigo-black, cap-height 0.08x figure width, word gap 0.05x cap-height so all three words read clearly separated, each word appears exactly once. Directly below the card's bottom border, a small roman-numeral arcana number plaque reads 'I' set in the same engraved serif style, fill pale gold, cap-height 0.035x figure width, appears exactly once. The vertical kanji column 五条悟 (Gojo Satoru, his name) is placed in the lower-right margin beside his trailing jacket hem, outside the figure's silhouette, rendered as a bold flat pale-gold engraved column matching the card's baroque gold linework, glyph size 0.065x figure width, one clean unbroken column of exactly three glyphs, gap between glyphs 0.04x glyph height, appears exactly once. No other text anywhere on the print.
palette: deep indigo night-blue, ivory white, rich baroque gold filigree, soft lavender-grey shading, parchment cream plaque, muted star-silver
chroma_note: Годжо целиком в холодных индиго/белых/золотых тонах без зелёного — зелёный хромакей безопасен. Подача максимально нейтральная и величественная (таро+барокко, не психоделика), чтобы не повторить прошлый блок safety-фильтра: блиндфолд закрытый, никаких глаз/энергии, чистая геральдическая роскошь.

name: Ботаническая гравюра (юмор) — Панда
moment: Panda stands full figure upright on two legs like a museum specimen, SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal view only (no second view, no model-sheet, no alternate angle anywhere on the print), the figure occupying 74% of frame height, standing in a stiff, serious, dignified pose as if posing for a formal scientific illustration, correct giant-panda anatomy throughout (ANATOMY: correct panda head and body proportions with the canon black-and-white fur pattern, no human facial features, exactly two arms and two legs in an upright bipedal stance, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure anywhere in the composition), both arms held stiffly at his sides with paws slightly open, a small subtle circular seam-line motif on his chest hinting at his engineered core plating without being played as a wound. Behind him a soft cream aged-paper background fills the canvas with a faint foxing-speckle texture, thin hairline latin-style caption-rules with small serif label text run beneath each numbered anatomical callout, three thin pointer-lines extend from small numbered labels ('1 - fur', '2 - paw', '3 - core?') toward corresponding points beside his silhouette (not overlapping his body), a thin single-rule border frames the full plate at the canvas edge.
art_style: научная ботаническая/зоологическая гравюрная пластина XIX века с юмором: тонкая перекрёстная штриховка вместо теней, кремовая состаренная бумага с лёгкими пятнами fox-ing, мелкие подписи-выноски с номерами как в музейной анатомической таблице, тонкая единичная рамка по краю листа, сдержанная приглушённая палитра без ярких плашек, серьёзная поза персонажа контрастирует с шутливыми подписями
typography: Main phrase 'PLATE XII' is set at the top edge of the canvas centered above Panda's head, fill flat sepia-brown engraved serif capitals matching antique plate-numbering convention, cap-height 0.055x figure width, word gap 0.05x cap-height so both words read clearly separated, each word appears exactly once. The secondary caption 'Panda -- Jujutsu High' is set in a small elegant italic serif script directly beneath the figure's feet in the lower third of the plate, fill flat sepia-brown, cap-height 0.035x figure width, letter-spacing slightly open for legibility at small size, appears exactly once as a single unbroken line. The three small numbered callout labels ('1 - fur', '2 - paw', '3 - core?') sit beside their pointer-lines at figure-flank height, fill flat sepia-brown matching the caption, cap-height 0.028x figure width each (kept above the small-text legibility floor), each label appears exactly once and does not repeat the main or secondary phrase. The vertical katakana column パンダ (Panda, his name) is placed in the upper-right margin beside his shoulder, outside the figure's silhouette, rendered as a fine engraved sepia-brown column matching the plate linework, glyph size 0.06x figure width, one clean unbroken column of exactly three glyphs, gap between glyphs 0.04x glyph height, appears exactly once. No other text anywhere on the print.
palette: cream aged paper, sepia-brown engraved linework, jet-black fur patches, soft ivory-white fur base, muted rose caption-rule accent
chroma_note: Палитра кремово-сепийная с чёрно-белым мехом без зелёного — зелёный хромакей безопасен; крупные чёрные меховые пятна рискуют по контрасту зазубрить кромку при вырезке — при сведении проверить края чёрных пятен меха отдельно от кремового фона листа.

name: Витраж — Юта Оккоцу
moment: Yuta Okkotsu stands full figure, SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal view only (no second view, no model-sheet, no alternate angle anywhere on the print), the figure occupying 76% of frame height, standing in a calm, resolute, protective stance with feet grounded, his soft dark hair and gentle but determined expression rendered in flat stained-glass panel shapes with bold black leading-lines, wearing his canon high-collar school uniform jacket, both hands gripping the hilt of a single katana held upright in front of him point-up, blade catching a single sharp panel-highlight. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two legs, correct human anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure, no additional face or figure anywhere in the composition. Behind his back, two long ribbon-like streams of abstract stained-glass energy sweep upward and outward like a pair of great wings, built entirely from flat colored glass-panel shapes and bold black leading with no facial features, no eyes, and no hidden figure within them — purely ornamental ribbon-wing shapes. The whole scene sits inside a tall pointed Gothic cathedral arch filling the canvas, thick stone tracery mouldings frame the arch's curve, small quatrefoil glass roundels are set into the tracery at the arch's shoulders, warm light glows evenly through every glass panel as if backlit.
art_style: витраж готического собора: плоские насыщенные цветные стеклянные панели, толстые чёрные свинцовые линии-перемычки между каждым элементом, каменная ажурная резьба готической арки как обрамление, ровный тёплый свет сквозь стекло без реалистичных теней, орнаментальные ленты энергии построены той же витражной техникой, что и вся сцена
typography: Main phrase 'I WILL PROTECT THEM' is set inside the arch's topmost pointed keystone panel above Yuta's head, panel fill flat deep-cobalt glass with a thick black leading border matching the arch's ironwork, the phrase set in a tall Gothic blackletter-inspired display face kept clean and fully legible (no illegible decorative overload), fill solid warm gold, cap-height 0.06x figure width, word gap 0.045x cap-height so all four words read clearly separated, each word appears exactly once. The vertical katakana column ユウタ (Yuta, his name) is placed in the lower-right margin beside his trailing coat hem, outside the figure's silhouette, rendered as a bold flat warm-gold stained-glass column matching the keystone lettering with thick black leading around each glyph, glyph size 0.065x figure width, one clean unbroken column of exactly three glyphs, gap between glyphs 0.04x glyph height, appears exactly once. No other text anywhere on the print.
palette: deep cobalt-blue glass, warm amber-gold leading accent, ruby-red ribbon-wing panels, emerald-green ribbon-wing panels, stone-grey tracery, warm skin-tone glass
chroma_note: ВНИМАНИЕ: витражные ленты-крылья за спиной намеренно включают изумрудно-зелёные стеклянные панели как часть многоцветной витражной палитры — зелёный хромакей слился бы с этими панелями, поэтому хромакей для сведения фона на этом принте СИНИЙ (chroma: blue).
